name: Formatting edge manual-review shadow case
notes: Uses the OCR formatting-edge fixture on both sides so we can track whether ODL preserves safety on parentheses negatives, blank comparative cells, and incomplete statement coverage.
knownEvidenceLimitations: The OpenDataLoader side for this case uses the repo OCR regression fixture as a captured stand-in for degraded OCR/hybrid output, not a live local or live hybrid ODL parse.
